title: YesIDownloadedYourResourcepack
description: server just wont kick if you reject resourcepack
body:
# YesIDownloadedYourResourcepack

now you wont be kicked from server if you dont want to download his faithful resourcepack

## How it works

this mod simply replaces resourcepack status packet with successful one

## Screenshots
